---
title: About
---

## A landing page for LGBTQIA+ people interested in code and research software engineering


- Started as a hack-day project at the Sofware Sustainability Institute Collaboration Workshop 2026.

- This resource was created as a welcoming entry to coding and research software engineering where everyone is welcome.  

- We want to empower community, collaboration, and networking.

Initial contributors:

- Liam Pattinson

- Ella Kaye

- Aleksandr Kovalenko

- Tobias Burkhard

- Esther Turner

- Steve Irvine

- Samantha Ahern


## Codes of Conduct and Contribution guide

[Code of conduct](https://www.software.ac.uk/training/research-software-camps/code-of-conduct)

[Contributing Guide](https://contributing.md/)
